name: HR payroll managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll files/month tool
description: For HR payroll managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll files/month, manual timesheet entry causes late payroll processing. We convert timesheet entries into formatted payroll files instead of manual entry.
target_audience: HR payroll managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll files/month
problem_solved: Manual timesheet entry leads to errors and delays in payroll processing.
features: User-friendly interface for manual data entry
Export functionality for payroll file formats
